basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Jr Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Jr. Research Fellow Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelors or Masters degree in mathematics, computer science, or closely related discipline, Strong foundation in discrete mathematics and algorithms, Interest in algebra, number theory, or theoretical computer science, Familiarity with abstract algebra, computational complexity and symbolic computation (useful but not essential), Comfortable with reading and writing proofs, Interest in pursuing a PhD, NET/GATE (relaxable for CFTI graduates with CGPA >8.000)
qualification.details: Bachelors or Masters degree in mathematics, computer science, or a closely related discipline. Strong foundation in discrete mathematics and algorithms. Interest in algebra, number theory, or theoretical computer science. Familiarity with abstract algebra, computational complexity and symbolic computation is useful but not essential. Comfortable with reading and writing proofs. Interest in pursuing a PhD. NET/GATE is required (relaxable for CFTI graduates with CGPA >8.000).

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Delhi Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Bachelors or Masters degree in mathematics, computer science, or a closely related discipline. Strong foundation in discrete mathematics and algorithms. Interest in algebra, number theory, or theoretical computer science. Familiarity with abstract algebra, computational complexity and symbolic computation is useful but not essential. Comfortable with reading and writing proofs. Interest in pursuing a PhD. NET/GATE is required (relaxable for CFTI graduates with CGPA >8.000).

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Jr. Research Fellow position at IIT Delhi?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting applications via email for the Jr. Research Fellow position at IIT Delhi is 31st July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Jr. Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a Bachelors or Masters degree in mathematics, computer science, or a closely related discipline with a strong foundation in discrete mathematics and algorithms. An interest in algebra, number theory, or theoretical computer science is also beneficial.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Jr. Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000/- plus HRA at 27%.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Jr. Research Fellow role at IIT Delhi?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply via email. Prepare your application with all necessary documents and send it to the official email address provided in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is NET/GATE qualification mandatory for all candidates?
faq.answer: NET/GATE qualification is required, however, it is relaxable for graduates from Centrally Funded Technical Institutions (CFTIs) who have a CGPA greater than 8.000.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Jr. Research Fellow at IIT Delhi is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all detailed information about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website for more information?
faq.answer: For more information regarding this recruitment and other updates, you can visit the official website of IIT Delhi's Research & Development (IRD) section, which is http://ird.iitd.ac.in/rec.
